name: rldyour-browser
description: Браузерная проверка и debug для Playwright/DevTools. EN: Browser validation and debugging workflows.

interface.longDescription: Браузерные workflows Codex для browser validation, screenshots, long-horizon web tasks и runtime-debug. EN: This skills-only plugin defines automatic browser workflows for Codex. Its skills should be selected automatically when the owner asks to check in the browser, verify visually, validate a UI, inspect screenshots, test a user flow, prove business logic, compare pixel-perfect output, run a long-horizon reusable web task, debug console/network/runtime/layout failures, or analyze performance. Webwright is the high-level provider for reusable web tasks and final_script.py workflows. Playwright CLI is the low-level provider for user-flow reproduction, functional validation, business-logic verification, screenshots, snapshots, responsive matrices, traces, and final UI checks. Chrome DevTools MCP is the specialist provider for console, network, DOM/runtime, layout, Lighthouse, performance trace, memory, and deeper browser debugging. Browser artifacts such as screenshots, videos, traces, PDFs, and temporary evidence must be written under browser/ and treated as ignored local artifacts unless the owner explicitly asks to preserve them.
defaultPrompt: Используй $browser-validation: проверь UI в браузере через Playwright CLI evidence. EN: browser validation.
Используй $browser-debug: консоль, сеть, runtime через Chrome DevTools MCP. EN: browser debug.
Используй $browser-tool-routing: выбери Webwright, Playwright CLI или DevTools. EN: route browser providers.
